title: Assess effective stunning and bleeding
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Assess effective stunning and bleeding demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Assess the effective stunning of an animal

pcs.text: Select and fit personal protective equipment (PPE)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and fit personal protective equipment (PPE)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and fit personal protective equipment (PPE).

pcs.text: Check animal for an effective stun prior to bleeding ensuring that processes comply with workplace and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check animal for an effective stun prior to bleeding ensuring that processes comply with workplace and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check animal for an effective stun prior to bleeding ensuring that processes comply with workplace and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Take corrective action when effective stun is not achieved
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take corrective action when effective stun is not achieved?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take corrective action when effective stun is not achieved.

pcs.text: Record the assessment of stunning according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record the assessment of stunning according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record the assessment of stunning according to workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Assess stunning against the applicable work instruction and standard to ensure it is effective and humane
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess stunning against the applicable work instruction and standard to ensure it is effective and humane?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess stunning against the applicable work instruction and standard to ensure it is effective and humane.
